claim: The prediction in atom ATOM_T012_S013_PRE_01 ("That's not going to be very good if the black box is wandering in its Behavio...") is the resolution of the blocker in atom ATOM_T010_S024_BLO_01 ("So we can't have many copies of exactly the same intelligence. So, we've got ...").
first_principles_validity_hypothesis: The predicted future state contains a mechanism that removes the named blocker; the prediction is therefore a market signal for the resolution mechanism.
why_novel_vs_speaker: The speaker frames the prediction (snippet S013) and the blocker (snippet S024) as independent statements; the resolution link is asserted by the analogy engine.
why_potentially_useful: Predictions that resolve known blockers are higher-value than predictions that simply extrapolate trends — they imply an unaddressed market need.
